text: The action is one 'elementary perturbation' - a single-site typed edit from a closed algebra: low-level INSERT/DELETE/REPLACE and high-level HAVE/SUFFICES/EXTRACT_LEMMA/INDUCT/CASES/GENERALIZE/BLOCK. The plan calls this the single most important design decision; so far only the BLOCK macro is generated, and whether this algebra beats alternatives (token edits, free-form diffs, next-tactic-only) is a planned ablation.
